subject: FW: Taxes
body:
Please advise

-----Original Message-----
From: Catherine Derby [mailto:catherinederby@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Monday, October 08, 2007 10:16 AM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: Taxes


HI Rich,

I received your kind voicemail just now.  I have been out of town in the sticks with no cell service.  I will be in touch with you.  I have a quesion for you.  I filed an extension on my '06 taxes.  That deadline is the 15...problem being..the person who NEVER misplaces anything has suddenly misplaced her w-2 tax and wage statement!  Is there anyway that I could get a copy of NES from you?  Is there anyway I could receive it by end of this week considering I'm now racing against the 15?  

Again, I can't thank you enough.  You have always been a kind person to work with and I appreciate all of your help.  I'l be in touch.

Best,
Catherine
_________________________________________________________________
